001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
024
025import java.util.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools.*;
032
033/**
034 * This is the root document object for the Swagger 2.0 API specification.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * The Swagger Object is the root document that describes an entire API. It contains metadata about the API,
038 * available paths and operations, parameters, responses, security definitions, and other information. This is
039 * the Swagger 2.0 specification (predecessor to OpenAPI 3.0).
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>Swagger Specification:</h5>
042 * <p>
043 * The Swagger Object is composed of the following fields:
044 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
045 *    <li><c>swagger</c> (string, REQUIRED) - The Swagger Specification version (must be <js>"2.0"</js>)
046 *    <li><c>info</c> ({@link Info}, REQUIRED) - Provides metadata about the API
047 *    <li><c>host</c> (string) - The host (name or IP) serving the API
048 *    <li><c>basePath</c> (string) - The base path on which the API is served (relative to host)
049 *    <li><c>schemes</c> (array of string) - The transfer protocols of the API (e.g., <js>"http"</js>, <js>"https"</js>)
050 *    <li><c>consumes</c> (array of string) - A list of MIME types the APIs can consume
051 *    <li><c>produces</c> (array of string) - A list of MIME types the APIs can produce
052 *    <li><c>paths</c> (map of {@link OperationMap}, REQUIRED) - The available paths and operations for the API
053 *    <li><c>definitions</c> (map of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Schema definitions that can be referenced
054 *    <li><c>parameters</c> (map of {@link ParameterInfo}) - Parameters definitions that can be referenced
055 *    <li><c>responses</c> (map of {@link ResponseInfo}) - Response definitions that can be referenced
056 *    <li><c>securityDefinitions</c> (map of {@link SecurityScheme}) - Security scheme definitions
057 *    <li><c>security</c> (array of map) - Security requirements applied to all operations
058 *    <li><c>tags</c> (array of {@link Tag}) - A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata
059 *    <li><c>externalDocs</c> ({@link ExternalDocumentation}) - Additional external documentation
060 * </ul>
061 *
062 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
063 * <p class='bjava'>
064 *    <jc>// Create a Swagger document</jc>
065 *    Swagger <jv>doc</jv> = <jk>new</jk> Swagger()
066 *       .setSwagger(<js>"2.0"</js>)
067 *       .setInfo(
068 *          <jk>new</jk> Info()
069 *             .setTitle(<js>"Pet Store API"</js>)
070 *             .setVersion(<js>"1.0.0"</js>)
071 *       )
072 *       .setHost(<js>"petstore.swagger.io"</js>)
073 *       .setBasePath(<js>"/v2"</js>)
074 *       .setSchemes(<js>"https"</js>)
075 *       .addPath(<js>"/pets"</js>, <js>"get"</js>,
076 *          <jk>new</jk> Operation()
077 *             .setSummary(<js>"List all pets"</js>)
078 *             .addResponse(<js>"200"</js>, <jk>new</jk> ResponseInfo(<js>"Success"</js>))
079 *       );
080 * </p>
081 *
082 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
083 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2/">Swagger 2.0 Specification</a>
084 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/2-0/basic-structure/">Swagger Basic Structure</a>
085 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanSwagger2">juneau-bean-swagger-v2</a>
086 * </ul>
087 */
088@SuppressWarnings({
089   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
090})
091public class Swagger extends SwaggerElement {
092
093   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
094   private static final String ARG_c = "c";
095   private static final String ARG_in = "in";
096   private static final String ARG_method = "method";
097   private static final String ARG_methodName = "methodName";
098   private static final String ARG_name = "name";
099   private static final String ARG_operation = "operation";
100   private static final String ARG_parameter = "parameter";
101   private static final String ARG_path = "path";
102   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
103   private static final String ARG_ref = "ref";
104   private static final String ARG_response = "response";
105   private static final String ARG_scheme = "scheme";
106   private static final String ARG_schema = "schema";
107   private static final String ARG_securityScheme = "securityScheme";
108   private static final String ARG_status = "status";
109
110   private static interface MapOfStringLists extends Map<String,List<String>> {}
111
112   /** Represents a null swagger */
113   public static final Swagger NULL = new Swagger();
114
115   private static final Comparator<String> PATH_COMPARATOR = (o1, o2) -> o1.replace('{', '@').compareTo(o2.replace('{', '@'));
116
117   // Property name constants
118   private static final String PROP_basePath = "basePath";
119   private static final String PROP_consumes = "consumes";
120   private static final String PROP_definitions = "definitions";
121   private static final String PROP_externalDocs = "externalDocs";
122   private static final String PROP_host = "host";
123   private static final String PROP_info = "info";
124   private static final String PROP_parameters = "parameters";
125   private static final String PROP_paths = "paths";
126   private static final String PROP_produces = "produces";
127   private static final String PROP_responses = "responses";
128   private static final String PROP_schemes = "schemes";
129   private static final String PROP_security = "security";
130   private static final String PROP_securityDefinitions = "securityDefinitions";
131   private static final String PROP_swagger = "swagger";
132   private static final String PROP_tags = "tags";
133
134   private String swagger = "2.0";
135   private String host;
136   private String basePath;
137   private Info info;
138   private ExternalDocumentation externalDocs;
139   private Set<String> schemes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
140   private Set<MediaType> consumes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
141   private Set<MediaType> produces = new LinkedHashSet<>();
142   private Set<Tag> tags = new LinkedHashSet<>();
143   private List<Map<String,List<String>>> security = list();
144   private Map<String,JsonMap> definitions = map();
145   private Map<String,ParameterInfo> parameters = map();
146   private Map<String,ResponseInfo> responses = map();
147   private Map<String,SecurityScheme> securityDefinitions = map();
148
149   private Map<String,OperationMap> paths = new TreeMap<>(PATH_COMPARATOR);
150
151   /**
152    * Default constructor.
153    */
154   public Swagger() {}
155
156   /**
157    * Copy constructor.
158    *
159    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
160    */
161   public Swagger(Swagger copyFrom) {
162      super(copyFrom);
163
164      this.basePath = copyFrom.basePath;
165      this.consumes.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.consumes));
166      this.externalDocs = copyFrom.externalDocs == null ? null : copyFrom.externalDocs.copy();
167      this.host = copyFrom.host;
168      this.info = copyFrom.info == null ? null : copyFrom.info.copy();
169      this.produces.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.produces));
170      this.schemes.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.schemes));
171      this.swagger = copyFrom.swagger;
172
173      definitions.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.definitions, JsonMap::new));
174
175      copyFrom.paths.forEach((k, v) -> {
176         var m = new OperationMap();
177         v.forEach((k2, v2) -> m.put(k2, v2.copy()));
178         paths.put(k, m);
179      });
180
181      parameters.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.parameters, ParameterInfo::copy));
182      responses.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.responses, ResponseInfo::copy));
183      securityDefinitions.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.securityDefinitions, SecurityScheme::copy));
184
185      copyFrom.security.forEach(x -> {
186         Map<String,List<String>> m2 = map();
187         x.forEach((k, v) -> m2.put(k, copyOf(v)));
188         security.add(m2);
189      });
190
191      this.tags.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.tags, Tag::copy));
192   }
193
194   /**
195    * Bean property appender:  <property>consumes</property>.
196    *
197    * <p>
198    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
199    *
200    * @param values
201    *    The values to add to this property.
202    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
203    * @return This object.
204    */
205   public Swagger addConsumes(Collection<MediaType> values) {
206      if (nn(values))
207         consumes.addAll(values);
208      return this;
209   }
210
211   /**
212    * Bean property appender:  <property>consumes</property>.
213    *
214    * <p>
215    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
216    *
217    * @param values
218    *    The values to add to this property.
219    *    <br>Values MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
220    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
221    * @return This object.
222    */
223   public Swagger addConsumes(MediaType...values) {
224      if (nn(values))
225         for (var v : values)
226            if (nn(v))
227               consumes.add(v);
228      return this;
229   }
230
231   /**
232    * Bean property appender:  <property>definitions</property>.
233    *
234    * <p>
235    * Adds a single value to the <property>definitions</property> property.
236    *
237    * @param name A definition name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
238    * @param schema The schema that the name defines.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
239    * @return This object.
240    */
241   public Swagger addDefinition(String name, JsonMap schema) {
242      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
243      assertArgNotNull(ARG_schema, schema);
244      definitions.put(name, schema);
245      return this;
246   }
247
248   /**
249    * Bean property appender:  <property>parameters</property>.
250    *
251    * <p>
252    * Adds a single value to the <property>parameter</property> property.
253    *
254    * @param name The parameter name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
255    * @param parameter The parameter definition.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
256    * @return This object.
257    */
258   public Swagger addParameter(String name, ParameterInfo parameter) {
259      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
260      assertArgNotNull(ARG_parameter, parameter);
261      parameters.put(name, parameter);
262      return this;
263   }
264
265   /**
266    * Bean property appender:  <property>paths</property>.
267    *
268    * <p>
269    * Adds a single value to the <property>paths</property> property.
270    *
271    * @param path The path template.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
272    * @param methodName The HTTP method name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
273    * @param operation The operation that describes the path.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
274    * @return This object.
275    */
276   public Swagger addPath(String path, String methodName, Operation operation) {
277      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
278      assertArgNotNull(ARG_methodName, methodName);
279      assertArgNotNull(ARG_operation, operation);
280      paths.computeIfAbsent(path, k -> new OperationMap()).put(methodName, operation);
281      return this;
282   }
283
284   /**
285    * Bean property appender:  <property>produces</property>.
286    *
287    * <p>
288    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
289    *
290    * @param values
291    *    The values to add to this property.
292    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
293    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
294    * @return This object.
295    */
296   public Swagger addProduces(Collection<MediaType> values) {
297      if (nn(values))
298         produces.addAll(values);
299      return this;
300   }
301
302   /**
303    * Adds one or more values to the <property>produces</property> property.
304    *
305    * <p>
306    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
307    *
308    * @param values
309    *    The values to add to this property.
310    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
311    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
312    * @return This object.
313    */
314   public Swagger addProduces(MediaType...values) {
315      if (nn(values))
316         for (var v : values)
317            if (nn(v))
318               produces.add(v);
319      return this;
320   }
321
322   /**
323    * Bean property appender:  <property>responses</property>.
324    *
325    * <p>
326    * Adds a single value to the <property>responses</property> property.
327    *
328    * @param name The response name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
329    * @param response The response definition.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
330    * @return This object.
331    */
332   public Swagger addResponse(String name, ResponseInfo response) {
333      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
334      assertArgNotNull(ARG_response, response);
335      responses.put(name, response);
336      return this;
337   }
338
339   /**
340    * Bean property appender:  <property>schemes</property>.
341    *
342    * <p>
343    * The transfer protocol of the API.
344    *
345    * @param values
346    *    The values to add to this property.
347    *    <br>Valid values:
348    *    <ul>
349    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
350    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
351    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
352    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
353    *    </ul>
354    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
355    * @return This object.
356    */
357   public Swagger addSchemes(Collection<String> values) {
358      if (nn(values))
359         schemes.addAll(values);
360      return this;
361   }
362
363   /**
364    * Bean property appender:  <property>schemes</property>.
365    *
366    * <p>
367    * The transfer protocol of the API.
368    *
369    * @param values
370    *    The values to add to this property.
371    *    <br>Valid values:
372    *    <ul>
373    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
374    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
375    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
376    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
377    *    </ul>
378    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
379    * @return This object.
380    */
381   public Swagger addSchemes(String...values) {
382      if (nn(values))
383         for (var v : values)
384            if (nn(v))
385               schemes.add(v);
386      return this;
387   }
388
389   /**
390    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>security</property>.
391    *
392    * <p>
393    * A declaration of which security schemes are applied for the API as a whole.
394    *
395    * @param values
396    *    The values to add to this property.
397    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
398    * @return This object.
399    */
400   public Swagger addSecurity(Collection<Map<String,List<String>>> values) {
401      if (nn(values))
402         security.addAll(values);
403      return this;
404   }
405
406   /**
407    * Bean property appender:  <property>security</property>.
408    *
409    * <p>
410    * Adds a single value to the <property>securityDefinitions</property> property.
411    *
412    * @param scheme The security scheme that applies to this operation  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
413    * @param alternatives
414    *    The list of values describes alternative security schemes that can be used (that is, there is a logical OR between the security requirements).
415    * @return This object.
416    */
417   public Swagger addSecurity(String scheme, String...alternatives) {
418      assertArgNotNull(ARG_scheme, scheme);
419      Map<String,List<String>> m = map();
420      m.put(scheme, l(alternatives));
421      security.add(m);
422      return this;
423   }
424
425   /**
426    * Bean property appender:  <property>securityDefinitions</property>.
427    *
428    * <p>
429    * Adds a single value to the <property>securityDefinitions</property> property.
430    *
431    * @param name A security name.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
432    * @param securityScheme A security schema.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
433    * @return This object.
434    */
435   public Swagger addSecurityDefinition(String name, SecurityScheme securityScheme) {
436      assertArgNotNull(ARG_name, name);
437      assertArgNotNull(ARG_securityScheme, securityScheme);
438      securityDefinitions.put(name, securityScheme);
439      return this;
440   }
441
442   /**
443    * Bean property appender:  <property>tags</property>.
444    *
445    * <p>
446    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
447    *
448    * @param values
449    *    The values to add to this property.
450    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
451    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
452    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
453    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
454    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
455    * @return This object.
456    */
457   public Swagger addTags(Collection<Tag> values) {
458      if (nn(values))
459         tags.addAll(values);
460      return this;
461   }
462
463   /**
464    * Bean property appender:  <property>tags</property>.
465    *
466    * <p>
467    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
468    *
469    * @param values
470    *    The values to add to this property.
471    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
472    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
473    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
474    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
475    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
476    * @return This object.
477    */
478   public Swagger addTags(Tag...values) {
479      if (nn(values))
480         for (var v : values)
481            if (nn(v))
482               tags.add(v);
483      return this;
484   }
485
486   /**
487    * A synonym of {@link #toString()}.
488    * @return This object serialized as JSON.
489    */
490   public String asJson() {
491      return toString();
492   }
493
494   /**
495    * Make a deep copy of this object.
496    *
497    * @return A deep copy of this object.
498    */
499   public Swagger copy() {
500      return new Swagger(this);
501   }
502
503   /**
504    * Resolves a <js>"$ref"</js> tags to nodes in this swagger document.
505    *
506    * @param <T> The class to convert the reference to.
507    * @param ref The ref tag value.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
508    * @param c The class to convert the reference to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
509    * @return The referenced node, or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
510    */
511   public <T> T findRef(String ref, Class<T> c) {
512      assertArgNotNullOrBlank(ARG_ref, ref);
513      assertArgNotNull(ARG_c, c);
514      if (! ref.startsWith("#/"))
515         throw rex("Unsupported reference:  ''{0}''", ref);
516      try {
517         return new PathTraversal(this).get(ref.substring(1), c);
518      } catch (Exception e) {
519         throw bex(e, c, "Reference ''{0}'' could not be converted to type ''{1}''.", ref, cn(c));
520      }
521   }
522
523   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
524   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
525      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
526      return switch (property) {
527         case PROP_basePath -> toType(getBasePath(), type);
528         case PROP_consumes -> toType(getConsumes(), type);
529         case PROP_definitions -> toType(getDefinitions(), type);
530         case PROP_externalDocs -> toType(getExternalDocs(), type);
531         case PROP_host -> toType(getHost(), type);
532         case PROP_info -> toType(getInfo(), type);
533         case PROP_parameters -> toType(getParameters(), type);
534         case PROP_paths -> toType(getPaths(), type);
535         case PROP_produces -> toType(getProduces(), type);
536         case PROP_responses -> toType(getResponses(), type);
537         case PROP_schemes -> toType(getSchemes(), type);
538         case PROP_security -> toType(getSecurity(), type);
539         case PROP_securityDefinitions -> toType(getSecurityDefinitions(), type);
540         case PROP_swagger -> toType(getSwagger(), type);
541         case PROP_tags -> toType(getTags(), type);
542         default -> super.get(property, type);
543      };
544   }
545
546   /**
547    * Bean property getter:  <property>basePath</property>.
548    *
549    * <p>
550    * The base path on which the API is served, which is relative to the <c>host</c>.
551    *
552    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
553    */
554   public String getBasePath() { return basePath; }
555
556   /**
557    * Bean property getter:  <property>consumes</property>.
558    *
559    * <p>
560    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
561    *
562    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
563    */
564   public Set<MediaType> getConsumes() { return nullIfEmpty(consumes); }
565
566   /**
567    * Bean property getter:  <property>definitions</property>.
568    *
569    * <p>
570    * An object to hold data types produced and consumed by operations.
571    *
572    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
573    */
574   public Map<String,JsonMap> getDefinitions() { return nullIfEmpty(definitions); }
575
576   /**
577    * Bean property getter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
578    *
579    * <p>
580    * Additional external documentation.
581    *
582    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
583    */
584   public ExternalDocumentation getExternalDocs() { return externalDocs; }
585
586   /**
587    * Bean property getter:  <property>host</property>.
588    *
589    * <p>
590    * The host (name or IP) serving the API.
591    *
592    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
593    */
594   public String getHost() { return host; }
595
596   /**
597    * Bean property getter:  <property>info</property>.
598    *
599    * <p>
600    * Provides metadata about the API.
601    *
602    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
603    */
604   public Info getInfo() { return info; }
605
606   /**
607    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path).get(operation);</c>
608    *
609    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
610    * @param operation The HTTP operation (e.g. <js>"get"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
611    * @return The operation for the specified path and operation id, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
612    */
613   public Operation getOperation(String path, String operation) {
614      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
615      assertArgNotNull(ARG_operation, operation);
616      return opt(getPath(path)).map(x -> x.get(operation)).orElse(null);
617   }
618
619   /**
620    * Convenience method for calling <c>getPath(path).get(method).getParameter(in,name);</c>
621    *
622    * @param path The HTTP path.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
623    * @param method The HTTP method.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
624    * @param in The parameter type.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
625    * @param name The parameter name.  Can be <jk>null</jk> for parameter type <c>body</c>.
626    * @return The parameter information or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
627    */
628   public ParameterInfo getParameterInfo(String path, String method, String in, String name) {
629      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
630      assertArgNotNull(ARG_method, method);
631      assertArgNotNull(ARG_in, in);
632      return opt(getPath(path)).map(x -> x.get(method)).map(x -> x.getParameter(in, name)).orElse(null);
633   }
634
635   /**
636    * Bean property getter:  <property>parameters</property>.
637    *
638    * <p>
639    * An object to hold parameters that can be used across operations.
640    *
641    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
642    */
643   public Map<String,ParameterInfo> getParameters() { return nullIfEmpty(parameters); }
644
645   /**
646    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path);</c>
647    *
648    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
649    * @return The operation map for the specified path, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
650    */
651   public OperationMap getPath(String path) {
652      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
653      return opt(getPaths()).map(x -> x.get(path)).orElse(null);
654   }
655
656   /**
657    * Bean property getter:  <property>paths</property>.
658    *
659    * <p>
660    * The available paths and operations for the API.
661    *
662    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
663    */
664   public Map<String,OperationMap> getPaths() { return nullIfEmpty(paths); }
665
666   /**
667    * Bean property getter:  <property>produces</property>.
668    *
669    * <p>
670    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
671    *
672    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
673    */
674   public Set<MediaType> getProduces() { return nullIfEmpty(produces); }
675
676   /**
677    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path).get(operation).getResponse(status);</c>
678    *
679    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).
680    * @param operation The HTTP operation (e.g. <js>"get"</js>).
681    * @param status The HTTP response status (e.g. <js>"200"</js>).
682    * @return The operation for the specified path and operation id, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
683    */
684   public ResponseInfo getResponseInfo(String path, String operation, int status) {
685      return getResponseInfo(path, operation, String.valueOf(status));
686   }
687
688   /**
689    * Shortcut for calling <c>getPaths().get(path).get(operation).getResponse(status);</c>
690    *
691    * @param path The path (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
692    * @param operation The HTTP operation (e.g. <js>"get"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
693    * @param status The HTTP response status (e.g. <js>"200"</js>).  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
694    * @return The operation for the specified path and operation id, or <jk>null</jk> if it doesn't exist.
695    */
696   public ResponseInfo getResponseInfo(String path, String operation, String status) {
697      assertArgNotNull(ARG_path, path);
698      assertArgNotNull(ARG_operation, operation);
699      assertArgNotNull(ARG_status, status);
700      return opt(getPath(path)).map(x -> x.get(operation)).map(x -> x.getResponse(status)).orElse(null);
701   }
702
703   /**
704    * Bean property getter:  <property>responses</property>.
705    *
706    * <p>
707    * An object to hold responses that can be used across operations.
708    *
709    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
710    */
711   public Map<String,ResponseInfo> getResponses() { return nullIfEmpty(responses); }
712
713   /**
714    * Bean property getter:  <property>schemes</property>.
715    *
716    * <p>
717    * The transfer protocol of the API.
718    *
719    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
720    */
721   public Set<String> getSchemes() { return nullIfEmpty(schemes); }
722
723   /**
724    * Bean property getter:  <property>security</property>.
725    *
726    * <p>
727    * A declaration of which security schemes are applied for the API as a whole.
728    *
729    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
730    */
731   public List<Map<String,List<String>>> getSecurity() { return nullIfEmpty(security); }
732
733   /**
734    * Bean property getter:  <property>securityDefinitions</property>.
735    *
736    * <p>
737    * Security scheme definitions that can be used across the specification.
738    *
739    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
740    */
741   public Map<String,SecurityScheme> getSecurityDefinitions() { return nullIfEmpty(securityDefinitions); }
742
743   /**
744    * Bean property getter:  <property>swagger</property>.
745    *
746    * <p>
747    * Specifies the Swagger Specification version being used.
748    *
749    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
750    */
751   public String getSwagger() { return swagger; }
752
753   /**
754    * Bean property getter:  <property>tags</property>.
755    *
756    * <p>
757    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
758    *
759    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
760    */
761   public Set<Tag> getTags() { return nullIfEmpty(tags); }
762
763   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
764   public Set<String> keySet() {
765      // @formatter:off
766      var s = setb(String.class)
767         .addIf(nn(basePath), PROP_basePath)
768         .addIf(ne(consumes), PROP_consumes)
769         .addIf(ne(definitions), PROP_definitions)
770         .addIf(nn(externalDocs), PROP_externalDocs)
771         .addIf(nn(host), PROP_host)
772         .addIf(nn(info), PROP_info)
773         .addIf(ne(parameters), PROP_parameters)
774         .addIf(ne(paths), PROP_paths)
775         .addIf(ne(produces), PROP_produces)
776         .addIf(ne(responses), PROP_responses)
777         .addIf(ne(schemes), PROP_schemes)
778         .addIf(ne(security), PROP_security)
779         .addIf(ne(securityDefinitions), PROP_securityDefinitions)
780         .addIf(nn(swagger), PROP_swagger)
781         .addIf(ne(tags), PROP_tags)
782         .build();
783      // @formatter:on
784      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
785   }
786
787   @SuppressWarnings({
788      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
789      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in generic type conversions
790   })
791   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
792   public Swagger set(String property, Object value) {
793      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
794      return switch (property) {
795         case PROP_basePath -> setBasePath(s(value));
796         case PROP_consumes -> setConsumes(toListBuilder(value, MediaType.class).sparse().build());
797         case PROP_definitions -> setDefinitions(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, JsonMap.class).sparse().build());
798         case PROP_externalDocs -> setExternalDocs(toType(value, ExternalDocumentation.class));
799         case PROP_host -> setHost(s(value));
800         case PROP_info -> setInfo(toType(value, Info.class));
801         case PROP_parameters -> setParameters(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, ParameterInfo.class).sparse().build());
802         case PROP_paths -> setPaths(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, OperationMap.class).sparse().build());
803         case PROP_produces -> setProduces(toListBuilder(value, MediaType.class).sparse().build());
804         case PROP_responses -> setResponses(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, ResponseInfo.class).sparse().build());
805         case PROP_schemes -> setSchemes(toListBuilder(value, String.class).sparse().build());
806         case PROP_security -> setSecurity((List)toListBuilder(value, MapOfStringLists.class).sparse().build());
807         case PROP_securityDefinitions -> setSecurityDefinitions(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, SecurityScheme.class).sparse().build());
808         case PROP_swagger -> setSwagger(s(value));
809         case PROP_tags -> setTags(toListBuilder(value, Tag.class).sparse().build());
810         default -> {
811            super.set(property, value);
812            yield this;
813         }
814      };
815   }
816
817   /**
818    * Bean property setter:  <property>basePath</property>.
819    *
820    * <p>
821    * The base path on which the API is served, which is relative to the <c>host</c>.
822    *
823    * @param value
824    *    The new value for this property.
825    *    <br>If it is not included, the API is served directly under the <c>host</c>.
826    *    <br>The value MUST start with a leading slash (/).
827    *    <br>The <c>basePath</c> does not support <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#pathTemplating">path templating</a>.
828    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
829    * @return This object.
830    */
831   public Swagger setBasePath(String value) {
832      basePath = value;
833      return this;
834   }
835
836   /**
837    * Bean property setter:  <property>consumes</property>.
838    *
839    * <p>
840    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
841    *
842    * @param value
843    *    The new value for this property.
844    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
845    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
846    * @return This object.
847    */
848   public Swagger setConsumes(Collection<MediaType> value) {
849      consumes.clear();
850      if (nn(value))
851         consumes.addAll(value);
852      return this;
853   }
854
855   /**
856    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>consumes</property>.
857    *
858    * <p>
859    * A list of MIME types the APIs can consume.
860    *
861    * @param value
862    *    The values to set on this property.
863    * @return This object.
864    */
865   public Swagger setConsumes(MediaType...value) {
866      setConsumes(setb(MediaType.class).sparse().add(value).build());
867      return this;
868   }
869
870   /**
871    * Bean property setter:  <property>definitions</property>.
872    *
873    * <p>
874    * An object to hold data types produced and consumed by operations.
875    *
876    * @param value
877    *    The new value for this property.
878    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
879    * @return This object.
880    */
881   public Swagger setDefinitions(Map<String,JsonMap> value) {
882      definitions.clear();
883      if (nn(value))
884         definitions.putAll(value);
885      return this;
886   }
887
888   /**
889    * Bean property setter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
890    *
891    * <p>
892    * Additional external documentation.
893    *
894    * @param value
895    *    The new value for this property.
896    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
897    * @return This object.
898    */
899   public Swagger setExternalDocs(ExternalDocumentation value) {
900      externalDocs = value;
901      return this;
902   }
903
904   /**
905    * Bean property setter:  <property>host</property>.
906    *
907    * <p>
908    * The host (name or IP) serving the API.
909    *
910    * @param value
911    *    The new value for this property.
912    *    <br>This MUST be the host only and does not include the scheme nor sub-paths.
913    *    <br>It MAY include a port.
914    *    <br>If the host is not included, the host serving the documentation is to be used (including the port).
915    *    <br>The host does not support <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#pathTemplating">path templating</a>
916    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
917    * @return This object.
918    */
919   public Swagger setHost(String value) {
920      host = value;
921      return this;
922   }
923
924   /**
925    * Bean property setter:  <property>info</property>.
926    *
927    * <p>
928    * Provides metadata about the API.
929    *
930    * @param value
931    *    The new value for this property.
932    *    <br>Property value is required.
933    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
934    * @return This object.
935    */
936   public Swagger setInfo(Info value) {
937      info = value;
938      return this;
939   }
940
941   /**
942    * Bean property setter:  <property>parameters</property>.
943    *
944    * <p>
945    * An object to hold parameters that can be used across operations.
946    *
947    * @param value
948    *    The new value for this property.
949    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
950    * @return This object.
951    */
952   public Swagger setParameters(Map<String,ParameterInfo> value) {
953      parameters.clear();
954      if (nn(value))
955         parameters.putAll(value);
956      return this;
957   }
958
959   /**
960    * Bean property setter:  <property>paths</property>.
961    *
962    * <p>
963    * The available paths and operations for the API.
964    *
965    * @param value
966    *    The new value for this property.
967    *    <br>Property value is required.
968    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
969    * @return This object.
970    */
971   public Swagger setPaths(Map<String,OperationMap> value) {
972      paths.clear();
973      if (nn(value))
974         paths.putAll(value);
975      return this;
976   }
977
978   /**
979    * Bean property setter:  <property>produces</property>.
980    *
981    * <p>
982    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
983    *
984    * @param value
985    *    The new value for this property.
986    *    <br>Value MUST be as described under <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification#mimeTypes">Swagger Mime Types</a>.
987    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
988    * @return This object.
989    */
990   public Swagger setProduces(Collection<MediaType> value) {
991      produces.clear();
992      if (nn(value))
993         produces.addAll(value);
994      return this;
995   }
996
997   /**
998    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>produces</property>.
999    *
1000    * <p>
1001    * A list of MIME types the APIs can produce.
1002    *
1003    * @param value
1004    *    The new value for this property.
1005    * @return This object.
1006    */
1007   public Swagger setProduces(MediaType...value) {
1008      setProduces(setb(MediaType.class).sparse().add(value).build());
1009      return this;
1010   }
1011
1012   /**
1013    * Bean property setter:  <property>responses</property>.
1014    *
1015    * <p>
1016    * An object to hold responses that can be used across operations.
1017    *
1018    * @param value
1019    *    The new value for this property.
1020    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1021    * @return This object.
1022    */
1023   public Swagger setResponses(Map<String,ResponseInfo> value) {
1024      responses.clear();
1025      if (nn(value))
1026         responses.putAll(value);
1027      return this;
1028   }
1029
1030   /**
1031    * Bean property setter:  <property>schemes</property>.
1032    *
1033    * <p>
1034    * The transfer protocol of the API.
1035    *
1036    * @param value
1037    *    The new value for this property.
1038    *    <br>Valid values:
1039    *    <ul>
1040    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
1041    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
1042    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
1043    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
1044    *    </ul>
1045    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1046    * @return This object.
1047    */
1048   public Swagger setSchemes(Collection<String> value) {
1049      schemes.clear();
1050      if (nn(value))
1051         schemes.addAll(value);
1052      return this;
1053   }
1054
1055   /**
1056    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>schemes</property>.
1057    *
1058    * <p>
1059    * The transfer protocol of the API.
1060    *
1061    * @param value
1062    *    The new value for this property.
1063    *    <br>Strings can be JSON arrays.
1064    * @return This object.
1065    */
1066   public Swagger setSchemes(String...value) {
1067      setSchemes(setb(String.class).sparse().addJson(value).build());
1068      return this;
1069   }
1070
1071   /**
1072    * Bean property setter:  <property>security</property>.
1073    *
1074    * <p>
1075    * A declaration of which security schemes are applied for the API as a whole.
1076    *
1077    * @param value
1078    *    The new value for this property.
1079    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1080    * @return This object.
1081    */
1082   public Swagger setSecurity(Collection<Map<String,List<String>>> value) {
1083      security.clear();
1084      if (nn(value))
1085         security.addAll(value);
1086      return this;
1087   }
1088
1089   /**
1090    * Bean property setter:  <property>securityDefinitions</property>.
1091    *
1092    * <p>
1093    * Security scheme definitions that can be used across the specification.
1094    *
1095    * @param value
1096    *    The new value for this property.
1097    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1098    * @return This object.
1099    */
1100   public Swagger setSecurityDefinitions(Map<String,SecurityScheme> value) {
1101      securityDefinitions.clear();
1102      if (nn(value))
1103         securityDefinitions.putAll(value);
1104      return this;
1105   }
1106
1107   /**
1108    * Bean property setter:  <property>swagger</property>.
1109    *
1110    * <p>
1111    * Specifies the Swagger Specification version being used.
1112    *
1113    * @param value
1114    *    The new value for this property.
1115    *    <br>Property value is required.
1116    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1117    * @return This object.
1118    */
1119   public Swagger setSwagger(String value) {
1120      swagger = value;
1121      return this;
1122   }
1123
1124   /**
1125    * Bean property setter:  <property>tags</property>.
1126    *
1127    * <p>
1128    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
1129    *
1130    * @param value
1131    *    The new value for this property.
1132    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
1133    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
1134    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
1135    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
1136    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1137    * @return This object.
1138    */
1139   public Swagger setTags(Collection<Tag> value) {
1140      tags.clear();
1141      if (nn(value))
1142         tags.addAll(value);
1143      return this;
1144   }
1145
1146   /**
1147    * Bean property setter:  <property>tags</property>.
1148    *
1149    * <p>
1150    * A list of tags used by the specification with additional metadata.
1151    *
1152    * @param value
1153    *    The new value for this property.
1154    *    <br>The order of the tags can be used to reflect on their order by the parsing tools.
1155    *    <br>Not all tags that are used by the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#operationObject">Operation Object</a> must be declared.
1156    *    <br>The tags that are not declared may be organized randomly or based on the tools' logic.
1157    *    <br>Each tag name in the list MUST be unique.
1158    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
1159    * @return This object.
1160    */
1161   public Swagger setTags(Tag...value) {
1162      setTags(setb(Tag.class).sparse().add(value).build());
1163      return this;
1164   }
1165
1166   /**
1167    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1168    *
1169    * @return This object.
1170    */
1171   @Override
1172   public Swagger strict() {
1173      super.strict();
1174      return this;
1175   }
1176
1177   /**
1178    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1179    *
1180    * @param value
1181    *    The new value for this property.
1182    *    <br>Non-boolean values will be converted to boolean using <code>Boolean.<jsm>valueOf</jsm>(value.toString())</code>.
1183    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (interpreted as <jk>false</jk>).
1184    * @return This object.
1185    */
1186   @Override
1187   public Swagger strict(Object value) {
1188      super.strict(value);
1189      return this;
1190   }
1191
1192   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1193   public String toString() {
1194      return JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(this);
1195   }
1196}
